summary: The user sought advice on improving their social media presence to promote their upcycled jewelry at artisan markets. They discussed strategies for engaging their audience on Instagram, including sharing stories behind their pieces, taking quality product photos, and incorporating calls-to-action to foster community engagement.
facts: The user participates in a monthly artisan market at the old warehouse district, where they sell upcycled jewelry. The user plans to create a series of Instagram posts showcasing their upcycled jewelry pieces, each with a brief story behind its creation. The user is inspired to share the story of a necklace made from recycled spoons that was popular at the last artisan market. The user intends to mention their upcoming artisan market appearance in their Instagram post, encouraging customers to visit their stall. The user plans to ask their followers about their favorite types of upcycled materials and what they would like to see created next.
